production.playableLoop: Aim, roll the ball down the lane, knock down a compact ten-pin rack, then reset for the next roll.
production.objective: Knock over all ten pins in one roll.
production.failRetry: A roll that misses the rack slows near the pit; press R to reset the lane and pins.

assetPlan.playerHero: Authored bowling ball prefab and material source in content/prefabs and content/materials.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Authored ten-pin rack and pin prefabs with compact scene placement.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Knockdown goal is represented by the pin rack and HUD score state.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Authored lane floor, gutters, rails, pin deck, and backstop source.
assetPlan.uiHud: Retained HUD and state UI source for aim, roll, score, reset, and win/fail feedback.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Procedural audio feedback evidence is retained under artifacts/game-production.
